headline: BofA is Bullish on Applied Materials, Inc. (AMAT)
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the 10 Best Semiconductor Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires. On June 23, BofA bumped up its price objective on Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) to $720 from $540. The firm maintained a “Buy” rating on the stock. The firm updated its semiconductor industry models and price objectives to […]

headline: CTA Treasury short covering gathers pace as equity longs face pressure
summary: Investing.com -- Systematic traders are rapidly covering bearish positions in U.S. Treasuries as falling bond yields trigger risk-management thresholds, while maintaining sizeable long equity positions despite recent stock market weakness, according to a new report from Bank of America.

headline: Berkshire May Just Save You From A Likely Market Crash
summary: Berkshire Hathaway is well-positioned to outperform the S&P 500 during near-term market turbulence, given its defensive portfolio. Read why BRK.A stock is a buy.

headline: Truist Increases Bank of America (BAC) Price Target, Cites Better-Than-Expected Trading Growth
summary: Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) is included among Billionaire Steven Cohen’s Top 11 Dividend Stock Picks. On June 26, Truist raised its price recommendation on Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC) to $64 from $61. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares.
